The '''Mine Type B''', or '''Mn/T2''', was an uncrewed static defense produced by the armaments manufacturer, [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]].

[[File:MineB2.jpg|thumb|left|A variant design of the Mn/T2.]]

A stationary mine armed with an omni-directional [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]], the Mn/T2 was an inexpensive anti-intruder countermeasure. The ion cannon provided defense against [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], and the contact detonation system was effective against [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], especially when the Mn/T2 was deployed in large numbers as a minefield.

The Mn/T2 played a slightly different strategic role to the [[Mine Type A|Mn/T1 Mine]]. The ability of the ion cannons to disable a vessel made it particularly popular with forces hoping to capture crewmembers alive, or seize craft intact.

It was also slightly shorter than the Mn/T1, although the presence of the ion cannon necessitated a bulky cylindrical apparatus on the underside of the mine, making it marginally more massive.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}

*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
